ocr_snippet: SEUM AMYLASE Sample Type : Serum U/L Bio. Ref. Range KINETIC Anytase is produced in the Pancreas and most of the elevation is due to increased rate of Anytase entry into the blood stream / decreased rate of clearance or both. Serum Amytase rises within 6 to 48 hours of Acute pancreatitis in 80% of patients, but is not proportional to the severity of the disease. Values persisting longer than this period suggest continuing necrosis of pancreas or pseudocyst formation.
